prompts.name: Sword
prompts.text: Add a sword with believable scale, clean blade geometry, detailed handle design, and natural interaction with the subject or setting.

prompts.name: Dagger
prompts.text: Add a small fantasy dagger with polished metal, ornate handle, and careful placement as a character accessory or prop.

prompts.name: Magic Staff
prompts.text: Add a magic staff with carved wood, crystal or metal details, subtle glow, and a design that supports the character theme.

prompts.name: Wand
prompts.text: Add a wand with elegant shape, small magical accents, and believable hand placement if held by the subject.

prompts.name: Bow
prompts.text: Add a bow with curved structure, string tension, and natural fantasy or historical styling.

prompts.name: Shield
prompts.text: Add a shield with readable shape, surface wear, emblem detail, and believable weight.

prompts.name: Spear
prompts.text: Add a spear with long shaft, clean metal point, and grounded fantasy or historical design.

prompts.name: Crafting Hammer
prompts.text: Add a crafting hammer or blacksmith hammer with worn handle, metal head, and practical tool detail.

prompts.name: Paintbrush
prompts.text: Add a paintbrush with bristles, handle detail, and natural artistic context.

prompts.name: Quill Pen
prompts.text: Add a quill pen with feather detail, ink, paper texture, and scholarly or fantasy atmosphere.

prompts.name: Map
prompts.text: Add an old map with parchment texture, folds, symbolic markings, and adventure-story feeling.

prompts.name: Compass
prompts.text: Add a compass with brass detail, glass cover, and travel or exploration mood.

prompts.name: Lantern
prompts.text: Add a lantern with warm glow, glass panels, metal frame, and realistic light interaction.

prompts.name: Ornate Key
prompts.text: Add an ornate key with aged metal, decorative teeth, and a sense of mystery or discovery.

prompts.name: Spellbook
prompts.text: Add a spellbook with worn cover, decorative clasp, thick pages, and subtle magical presence.
